sentences.sentence: The climate of the Earth is always changing.
sentences.translation: 地球的气候始终在变化。

structure.text: The climate of the Earth
is always changing

difficult_points: 现在进行时 changing 强调气候持续处于变化之中。
always 在这里描述长期规律，不表示抱怨。

sentences.sentence: In the past it has altered as a result of natural causes.
sentences.translation: 过去，气候变化是自然原因造成的。

structure.text: In the past
it has altered
as a result of natural causes

difficult_points: it 指 the climate of the Earth。
as a result of 后接名词短语，说明变化原因。

sentences.sentence: Nowadays, however, the term 'climate change' is generally used when referring to changes in our climate which have been identified since the early part of the twentieth century.
sentences.translation: 然而如今，“气候变化”一词通常用于指自 20 世纪初以来人们所观察到的气候改变。

structure.text: Nowadays, however
the term 'climate change' is generally used
when referring to changes in our climate which have been identified since the early part of the twentieth century

difficult_points: when referring 的逻辑主语是泛指的人们或使用该术语者，属于省略结构。
which 引导定语从句修饰 changes，have been identified 是现在完成时被动语态。

sentences.sentence: The changes we've seen over recent years and those which are predicted to occur over the next 100 years are thought by many to be largely a result of human behavior rather than due to natural changes in the atmosphere.
sentences.translation: 许多人认为，近年已经出现以及预计未来一百年会发生的变化，主要是人类行为而非大气自然变化所致。

structure.text: The changes we've seen over recent years and those which are predicted to occur over the next 100 years
are thought by many
to be largely a result of human behavior rather than due to natural changes in the atmosphere

difficult_points: we've seen 是省略 that 的定语从句；which 从句修饰 those。
rather than 对比 human behavior 与 natural changes 两种原因。

sentences.sentence: And this is what is so significant about current climactic trends; never before has man played such a significant role in determining long-term weather patterns – we are entering the unknown and there is no precedent for what might happen next.
sentences.translation: 这正是当前气候趋势意义重大的原因：人类从未在决定长期天气模式方面扮演过如此重要的角色——我们正在进入未知领域，对接下来可能发生的事没有先例可循。

structure.text: And this is what is so significant about current climactic trends
never before has man played such a significant role in determining long-term weather patterns
we are entering the unknown and there is no precedent for what might happen next

difficult_points: never before 置于句首引发 has man played 的部分倒装。
what might happen next 是介词 for 的宾语从句；climactic 在此语境疑为 climatic 的拼写误用。

sentences.sentence: The greenhouse effect is very important when we talk about climate change as it relates to the gases which keep the Earth warm.
sentences.translation: 讨论气候变化时，温室效应十分重要，因为它涉及使地球保持温暖的气体。

structure.text: The greenhouse effect is very important
when we talk about climate change
as it relates to the gases which keep the Earth warm

difficult_points: as 在这里引出原因，it 指 greenhouse effect。
which 引导定语从句修饰 gases，keep + 宾语 + 形容词作补语。

sentences.sentence: Although the greenhouse effect is a naturally occurring phenomenon, it is believed that the effect could be intensified by human activity and the emission of gases into the atmosphere.
sentences.translation: 虽然温室效应是一种自然发生的现象，但人们认为，人类活动以及向大气排放气体可能会加剧这一效应。

structure.text: Although the greenhouse effect is a naturally occurring phenomenon
it is believed
that the effect could be intensified by human activity and the emission of gases into the atmosphere

difficult_points: 主句 it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正被认为的内容。
could be intensified 是情态动词加被动语态。

sentences.sentence: It is the extra greenhouse gases which humans have released which are thought to pose the strongest threat.
sentences.translation: 被认为构成最大威胁的，正是人类额外排放的温室气体。

structure.text: It is the extra greenhouse gases
which humans have released
which are thought to pose the strongest threat

difficult_points: It is ... which ... 是强调句，焦点为 the extra greenhouse gases。
第一个 which 修饰 gases，第二个 which 完成强调结构并引出被动报告谓语。

sentences.sentence: Certain researchers, such as Dr Michael Crawley, argue: 'even though this natural phenomenon does exist it is without a doubt human activity that has worsened its effect; this is evident when comparing data regarding the earth's temperature in the last one hundred years with the one hundred years prior to that.'Some scientists, however, dispute this as Dr Ray Ellis suggests: 'human activity may be contributing a small amount to climate change but this increase in temperature is an unavoidable fact based on the research data we have compiled.
sentences.translation: 一些研究者（如迈克尔·克劳利博士）认为：“尽管这种自然现象确实存在，但毫无疑问，是人类活动加剧了它的影响；将过去一百年的地球温度数据与此前一百年相比，这一点十分明显。”然而，也有科学家对此提出异议；正如雷·埃利斯博士所说：“人类活动可能对气候变化有少量影响，但这种升温是我们所汇编研究数据表明的不可避免事实。”

structure.text: Certain researchers, such as Dr Michael Crawley, argue

even though this natural phenomenon does exist it is without a doubt human activity that has worsened its effect; this is evident when comparing data regarding the earth's temperature in the last one hundred years with the one hundred years prior to that
Some scientists, however, dispute this as Dr Ray Ellis suggests
human activity may be contributing a small amount to climate change but this increase in temperature is an unavoidable fact based on the research data we have compiled

difficult_points: 第一段引语含 even though 让步从句和 it is ... that 强调结构；does exist 用于强调“确实存在”。
两段话因 .'Some 之间缺空格而粘成同一原文单元，且第二段引语缺少闭合引号，均按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Scientists around the globe are looking at all the evidence surrounding climate change and using advanced technology have come up with predictions for our future environment and weather.
sentences.translation: 全球科学家正在研究与气候变化有关的全部证据，并利用先进技术对未来环境和天气作出预测。

structure.text: Scientists around the globe
are looking at all the evidence surrounding climate change
and using advanced technology have come up with predictions for our future environment and weather

difficult_points: surrounding climate change 是现在分词短语，修饰 evidence。
using advanced technology 是方式状语，逻辑主语为 Scientists；have come up 与前面的 are looking 时态不同。

sentences.sentence: The next stage of that work, which is just as important, is looking at the knock-on effects of potential changes.
sentences.translation: 这项工作的下一阶段同样重要，即研究潜在变化所产生的连锁影响。

structure.text: The next stage of that work, which is just as important
is looking at the knock-on effects of potential changes

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 next stage。
looking at ... 是动名词短语作表语，说明该阶段的工作。

sentences.sentence: For example, are we likely to see an increase in precipitation and sea levels?
sentences.translation: 例如，降水量和海平面是否可能上升？

structure.text: For example
are we likely to see
an increase in precipitation and sea levels

difficult_points: be likely to 表示有可能发生。
an increase in 同时支配 precipitation 和 sea levels。

expressions.text: be likely to see an increase in

sentences.sentence: Does this mean there will be an increase in flooding and what can we do to protect ourselves from that?
sentences.translation: 这是否意味着洪水会增多？我们又能做些什么来保护自己免受其害？

structure.text: Does this mean there will be an increase in flooding
and what can we do to protect ourselves from that

difficult_points: mean 后省略 that，there will be ... 是宾语从句。
that 指 flooding；to protect ... 是目的状语。

sentences.sentence: How will our health be affected by climate change, how will agricultural practices change and how will wildlife cope?
sentences.translation: 气候变化会怎样影响我们的健康？农业实践将如何改变？野生动物又将如何应对？

structure.text: How will our health be affected by climate change
how will agricultural practices change
and how will wildlife cope

difficult_points: 三个 how 疑问分句并列，分别涉及健康、农业和野生动物。
be affected by 是被动语态；cope 在此不带宾语，表示应对变化。

sentences.sentence: What will the effects on coral be?
sentences.translation: 气候变化会对珊瑚产生什么影响？

structure.text: What
will the effects on coral be

difficult_points: What 是系动词 be 的疑问表语。
on coral 后置修饰 effects，表示影响对象。

sentences.sentence: Professor Max Leonard has suggested, 'while it may be controversial some would argue that climate change could bring with it positive effects as well as negative ones'.
sentences.translation: 马克斯·伦纳德教授指出：“尽管这一观点可能有争议，但有人会认为气候变化带来的不仅有负面影响，也可能有正面影响。”

structure.text: Professor Max Leonard has suggested
while it may be controversial
some would argue that climate change could bring with it positive effects as well as negative ones

difficult_points: while 在引语中引导让步从句，后面原文缺少逗号。
bring with it 表示“随之带来”；as well as 连接 positive 与 negative effects。

expressions.text: positive effects as well as negative ones

sentences.sentence: There are many institutions around the world whose sole priority is to take action against these environmental problems.
sentences.translation: 世界各地有许多机构，其唯一的首要任务就是采取行动应对这些环境问题。

structure.text: There are many institutions around the world
whose sole priority is to take action against these environmental problems

difficult_points: whose 引导定语从句，表示 institutions 的职责。
to take action ... 是不定式作表语，说明 priority 内容。

sentences.sentence: Green Peace is the organisation that is probably the most well-known.
sentences.translation: “绿色和平”或许是其中最知名的组织。

structure.text: Green Peace
is the organisation
that is probably the most well-known

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 organisation。
Green Peace 通常拼作 Greenpeace，但原文分写，予以保留。

sentences.sentence: It is an international organisation that campaigns in favour of researching and promoting solutions to climate change, exposes the companies and governments that are blocking action, lobbies to change national and international policy, and bears witness to the impacts of unnecessary destruction and detrimental human activity.
sentences.translation: 它是一个国际组织，致力于研究和推广气候变化解决方案，揭露阻碍行动的企业和政府，游说改变国内与国际政策，并见证不必要的破坏及有害人类活动造成的影响。

structure.text: It is an international organisation

that campaigns in favour of researching and promoting solutions to climate change, exposes the companies and governments that are blocking action, lobbies to change national and international policy, and bears witness to the impacts of unnecessary destruction and detrimental human activity

difficult_points: 外层 that 从句修饰 organisation，内部含 campaigns、exposes、lobbies、bears witness 四个并列谓语。
内层 that are blocking action 修饰 companies and governments。

sentences.sentence: The problem of climate change is without a doubt something that this generation and the generations to come need to deal with.
sentences.translation: 毫无疑问，气候变化是这一代以及未来世代都必须应对的问题。

structure.text: The problem of climate change
is without a doubt something
that this generation and the generations to come need to deal with

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 something，并在从句中作 deal with 的宾语。
to come 是不定式后置修饰 generations，表示未来世代。

sentences.sentence: Fortunately, the use of renewable energy is becoming increasingly popular, which means that less energy is consumed as renewable energy is generated from natural resources—such as sunlight, wind, rain, tides, and geothermal heat—which can be naturally replenished.
sentences.translation: 幸运的是，可再生能源的使用日益普及；这意味着能源消耗可以减少，因为可再生能源来自阳光、风、雨、潮汐和地热等能够自然补充的资源。

structure.text: Fortunately, the use of renewable energy is becoming increasingly popular
which means that less energy is consumed as renewable energy is generated from natural resources—such as sunlight, wind, rain, tides, and geothermal heat—which can be naturally replenished

difficult_points: 第一个 which 指前面整件事，内部 that 从句作 means 的宾语，as 引出原因。
第二个 which 就近修饰 natural resources；破折号中列举资源实例。

sentences.sentence: Another way to help the environment, in terms of climate change, is by travelling light.
sentences.translation: 就气候变化而言，帮助环境的另一种方式是采用低负担出行。

structure.text: Another way to help the environment, in terms of climate change
is by travelling light

difficult_points: to help the environment 是不定式后置修饰 way。
travelling light 通常指轻装出行，此处结合下一句具体指步行或骑车等低碳出行。

sentences.sentence: Walking or riding a bike instead of driving a car uses fewer fossil fuels which release carbon dioxide into the atmosphere.
sentences.translation: 以步行或骑自行车代替开车，会消耗更少的化石燃料，而化石燃料会向大气释放二氧化碳。

structure.text: Walking or riding a bike instead of driving a car
uses fewer fossil fuels
which release carbon dioxide into the atmosphere

difficult_points: Walking 与 riding 并列构成主语，整体按一种出行选择处理，谓语用单数 uses。
which 修饰 fossil fuels，说明其排放影响。

expressions.text: release carbon dioxide into the atmosphere

sentences.sentence: In addition, using products that are made from recycled paper, glass, metal and plastic reduces carbon emissions because they use less energy to manufacture than products made from completely new materials.
sentences.translation: 此外，使用由再生纸、玻璃、金属和塑料制成的产品可以减少碳排放，因为制造这类产品所需的能源少于使用全新材料制造的产品。

structure.text: In addition
using products that are made from recycled paper, glass, metal and plastic
reduces carbon emissions because they use less energy to manufacture than products made from completely new materials

difficult_points: that are made from ... 是定语从句修饰 products。
they 指 recycled products；than 引出与全新材料产品的比较，made from ... 是过去分词修饰 products。

sentences.sentence: Recycling paper also saves trees and lets them continue to limit climate change naturally as they remain in the forest, where they remove carbon from the atmosphere.
sentences.translation: 回收纸张还能保护树木，使它们继续留在森林中，自然发挥限制气候变化的作用；树木会在那里吸收大气中的碳。

structure.text: Recycling paper
also saves trees and lets them continue to limit climate change naturally
as they remain in the forest, where they remove carbon from the atmosphere

difficult_points: them 和两个 they 都指 trees；let + 宾语 + 动词原形构成复合宾语。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 forest。

sentences.sentence: Professor Mark Halton, who has completed various studies in this field, has stated: 'with all this information and the possible action that we can take, it isn't too late to save our planet from over-heating and the even worse side-effects of our own activity
sentences.translation: 在这一领域完成过多项研究的马克·哈尔顿教授表示：“有了所有这些信息以及我们能够采取的行动，现在挽救地球、避免其过热和人类活动造成的更严重副作用，还为时不晚。”

structure.text: Professor Mark Halton, who has completed various studies in this field
has stated
with all this information and the possible action that we can take, it isn't too late to save our planet from over-heating and the even worse side-effects of our own activity

difficult_points: who 从句补充 Professor Mark Halton 的研究背景；that we can take 修饰 action。
it 是形式主语，to save ... 是实际内容；原文结尾缺少句号和闭合引号，按源文保留。

expressions.meaning_zh: 人类自身活动的副作用
